channel.title: Ipsec on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Ipsec on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: StrongSwan vs LibreSwan vs SoftEther: Best Self-Hosted VPN Gateway 2026
item.description: When you need a self-hosted VPN gateway for site-to-site connectivity, remote access, or secure network bridging, the choice of VPN software matters. While tools like wireguard and OpenVPN dominate the consumer space, enterprise-grade deployments often require the flexibility and proven security of IPSec or multi-protocol VPN solutions.
